sections_cited: section 73 of the Sindh Cooperative Societies Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Suit No.758 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Nazir report dated 11.08.2024. 2. For hearing of CMA No.8126/2023. 3. For hearing of CMA No.9744/2023. 4. For hearing of CMA No.9745/2023. 01.10.2024 Mr. Shahzad Raheem, advocate for the plaintiffs. Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Counsel for the plaintiffs submits that this suit has to be filed before the cooperative court as per section 73 of the Sindh Cooperative Societies Act, 2022, therefore, plaint may be returned. Order accordingly. Judge Khuhro/PA
